radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the group of subscription package radio buttons. Controls the layout style, the list of package options, and selection behavior.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the selection indicator on radio buttons. Possible values: 'Left' (indicator on the left), 'Right' (indicator on the right), 'None' (no indicator).

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

buttons.description: List of individual subscription package radio buttons to display. Each entry references a button configuration by ID and defines its visual state properties.

badge.description: Optional badge displayed on the radio button, typically used to highlight a discount or promotion (e.g. 'Save 50%').

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

color.description: Color applied to the badge text or background in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

variant.description: Visual variant of the badge, controlling its appearance style.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true, the badge is hidden when the parent radio button is not selected.

text.description: Label text displayed on the badge. Supports price placeholder tokens (e.g. '%%packageId%%' for discount percentage).

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the disabled/unselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value from the backend/API.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is pre-selected when the screen is first shown.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, renders the radio button using an enlarged/expanded layout variant.

id.description: References the subscription button component configuration by its ID in the 'subscription_button' remote settings list. Used to load the full button data including package info.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the disabled/unselected state. Color value from the backend/API.

border_color.description: Default border color of the radio button when it is not selected. Color value from the backend/API.

gradient_type.description: Specifies the gradient style applied to the radio button background.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting a radio button immediately triggers the subscription purchase flow without requiring a separate CTA button tap.

type.description: Determines the layout style of the radio button group. 'tiers_style' renders buttons using the tiers layout (RadioButtonsType.TiersStyle); any other value uses the default layout (RadioButtonsType.DefaultStyle).

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the toggle that allows users to opt in to a reminder before their free trial ends.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is shown. Defaults to false if not specified.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the trial reminder toggle component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings list.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration reference for the descriptive text displayed alongside the package switch toggle.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text component is shown.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the toggle placeholder text component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings list.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for this screen configuration. Used to look up the matching screen entry from the remote settings list. Falls back to the entry with content_id 'default' if no exact match is found.

footer.description: Configuration reference for the footer component displayed at the bottom of the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component is shown. If false, the component is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the footer component configuration by its ID in the corresponding remote settings list.

banner.description: Configuration reference for the banner image or media component displayed at the top of the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner image/media component is shown on the screen. If false, the banner is skipped.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the banner component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings list. Also supports per-component experiment keys of the form 'offer_screen_banners_{id}'.

description.description: Configuration reference for the description component on the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component is shown. If false, the component is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the description component configuration by its ID in the corresponding remote settings list.

title.description: Configuration reference for the main title text component displayed at the top of the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is shown on the screen. If false, the title view is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the title component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings list.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

close_button.description: Configuration reference for the close/dismiss button on the offer screen. Controls visibility, alignment, margins, and icon of the button that closes the offer.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button is shown. If false, the close button is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the close button component configuration by its ID in the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings list.

subtitle.description: Configuration reference for the subtitle text component displayed below the main title on the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is shown on the screen. If false, the subtitle view is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the subtitle component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings list.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration reference for the banner placeholder text component, which is displayed in place of a banner image when no banner is present.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder text component is shown. If false, the component is skipped entirely.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the banner placeholder component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings list.

secondary_button.description: Configuration reference for the secondary action button (e.g. 'See more plans'). Tapping it can open a hook URL or a subscription tiers half-screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is shown. If false, the button is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the secondary button component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings list.

logo.description: Configuration reference for the logo image displayed on the offer screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component is shown on the screen. If false, the logo is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the logo component configuration by its ID in the corresponding remote settings list.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration reference for the toggle that switches between subscription packages (e.g. between a regular and a free-trial package).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the package switch toggle is shown. If false, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability marker. Used internally for recomposition optimization. Not a user-facing field.

id.description: References the toggle component configuration by its ID in the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings list.
